name: openjkdf2.zip
items: Star Wars Jedi Knight - Dark Forces II.sh

attr.title: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
attr.desc: The 1997 LucasArts FPS that launched Kyle Katarn into the Jedi Knight saga. Native OpenJKDF2 engine port for ARM handhelds with GLES. Requires original game files from GOG or Steam.
attr.inst: Copy JKDF2 files to openjkdf2/jk1/. Optional Mysteries of the Sith to openjkdf2/mots/. Switch episodes in-game via Expansions & Mods.
